title: LS2 FF406 Gloss White

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner

technical_analysis: The LS2 FF406 utilizes a multi-density EPS liner system designed to absorb high-impact energy while maintaining structural integrity during rotational forces. The shell construction employs a carbon fiber composite overmolded onto an ABS core, significantly reducing overall weight without compromising the rigorous safety standards required by ECE 22.06 and DOT regulations. This hybrid approach ensures that the helmet meets modern crash test protocols while offering a lighter profile than traditional all-ABS counterparts.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of style and performance with the LS2 FF406 in a striking gloss white finish. Designed for riders who demand premium aesthetics without sacrificing safety, this full-face helmet features an aggressive aerodynamic profile that slices through the wind while keeping you cool on long rides. The sophisticated design is complemented by high-quality graphics that make a bold statement on the track or the street.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the LS2 FF406 Gloss White full-face motorcycle helmet. Features ECE 22.06 certification, lightweight carbon fiber composite shell, and superior ventilation for ultimate riding comfort and safety.
